title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入卡塔尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入卡達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Qatar QGOSM product conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards referenced in project specifications, Kahramaa grid-connection requirements, Qatar Civil Defence Department (QCDD) fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与卡塔尔QGOSM产品合格评定要求、项目规格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、Kahramaa并网要求、卡塔尔民防部（QCDD）消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求及50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與卡達QGOSM產品合格評定要求、項目規格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、Kahramaa併網要求、卡達民防部（QCDD）消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, QGOSM conformity scope determination, Kahramaa grid-connection approval, QCDD fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Qatar QGOSM Technical Regulations, Kahramaa grid-connection technical specifications, QCDD fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、QGOSM合格评定范围裁定、Kahramaa并网批准、QCDD消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行卡塔尔QGOSM技术法规、Kahramaa并网技术规格、QCDD消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、QGOSM合格評定範圍裁定、Kahramaa併網批准、QCDD消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行卡達QGOSM技術法規、Kahramaa併網技術規格、QCDD消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Qatar does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the Saudi SABER/IEC 62619 route or the EU Battery Regulation. BESS projects in Qatar operate primarily under project-specific international standards referenced in Kahramaa connection agreements and QCDD fire-safety approvals. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Qatar are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in Kahramaa or project-owner specifications; (3) QCDD fire-safety installation approval, including evidence aligned with NFPA codes as Qatar's primary fire-safety reference; (4) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions; and (5) 50 Hz grid configuration for BESS power conversion systems. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 evidence in project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 卡塔尔尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与沙特SABER/IEC 62619路径或欧盟《电池法规》相当。卡塔尔的BESS项目主要依据Kahramaa并网协议和QCDD消防安全审批中引用的项目专属国际标准运作。中国BESS出口卡塔尔的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为项目验收的国际预期基准；（2）Kahramaa或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）QCDD消防安全安装审批，包括与卡塔尔主要消防安全参考规范NFPA规范相符的证据；（4）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件；（5）BESS储能变流器的50 Hz电网配置。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是生产基准，但在项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC 62619证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 卡達尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與沙特SABER/IEC 62619路徑或歐盟《電池法規》相當。卡達的BESS項目主要依據Kahramaa併網協議和QCDD消防安全審批中引用的項目專屬國際標準運作。中國BESS出口卡達的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為項目驗收的國際預期基準；（2）Kahramaa或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）QCDD消防安全安裝審批，包括與卡達主要消防安全參考規範NFPA規範相符的證據；（4）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（5）BESS儲能變流器的50 Hz電網配置。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是製造基準，但在項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC 62619證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
